codeReview.summary: The fix addresses the prior discover-backend scrutiny failures. The scan now recursively traverses configured roots with depth and skip guards so nested repositories under organizer folders are discovered, `start_project_scan` reconciles stale `discovered_skills` rows within scanned roots after each run, and the platform-import flow no longer deletes the discovered record mid-batch. The added regression tests cover deep nesting, skipped directories, stale-cache cleanup, scoped reconciliation, and repeated platform imports.

summary: Pass. The discover fix resolves the prior blocking recursion and cache-reconciliation failures and keeps discovered records available across multi-platform installs.
